faqPage.title: Information & FAQ

about.title: About Higirap
about.description: We are a professional team specialized in upholstery cleaning and car detailing at your doorstep. We use injection-extraction technology and certified eco-friendly products to deliver exceptional results.

questions.q: How does the cleaning process work?
questions.a: We use professional injection-extraction machines along with eco-friendly products. We remove deep dirt, stains, and embedded odors.

questions.q: How long does the cleaning take?
questions.a: Generally between 1 and 3 hours, depending on the level of dirt and amount of furniture.

questions.q: Is the cleaning done at home?
questions.a: Yes, the entire service is performed at your home, no need to transport furniture.

questions.q: How long does it take to dry?
questions.a: Usually between 12 and 24 hours, depending on ventilation and fabric type.
We use eco-friendly and hypoallergenic products, safe for children and pets.

questions.q: Do you eliminate mites and bacteria?
questions.a: Yes, thanks to deep cleaning and steam disinfection, we eliminate mites, bacteria, and allergens.

questions.q: Do you use strongly scented products?
questions.a: No, we use products with mild or neutral scents.

questions.q: How can I find out the exact price?
questions.a: You can use the calculator on our service pages or send us photos via WhatsApp for an exact quote.
In most cases, travel is included. A supplement may apply for remote areas.

questions.q: In what cases can the price change?
questions.a: The price may vary if incorrect measurements or special characteristics were not previously communicated.
Yes, you can change the date with several days notice, subject to availability.
Yes, we offer urgent service subject to availability.
We provide service throughout the metropolitan area and surroundings.

questions.q: What if a stain doesn't come out?
questions.a: We always inform you if a stain may not disappear completely. We do our best for the best result.
We'll review the work and find a solution to improve the result.
Yes, we eliminate even the most persistent odors with professional products and techniques.
We recommend at least once a year, as dust, sweat, and odors accumulate over time.
